# Avelorx

> Real-time queue visibility and time optimization platform for offline services.

Avelorx is a SaaS platform that enables users to discover nearby service providers — restaurants, salons, clinics, and diagnostic centers — view live wait times, and join queues remotely. It shifts consumer decision-making from proximity-based to time-based, reducing wasted waiting time and improving service access in high-density urban environments.

## What It Does

- Real-time wait time visibility across multiple service categories
- Remote queue joining — hold your place without being physically present
- Live queue position tracking with arrival notifications
- Category-based discovery (food, healthcare, personal care, diagnostics)
- Business-facing dashboard for queue management and customer flow control

## Problem It Solves

In urban environments, people visiting restaurants, salons, clinics, and similar services face unpredictable and unmanaged wait times. There is no unified system giving real-time visibility into service demand across locations. Avelorx fills this gap.

## Target Users

- Urban consumers who regularly use walk-in offline services
- Businesses (restaurants, salons, clinics) that manage physical customer queues

## Business Model

Dual-sided platform: free for consumers, SaaS subscription for businesses.

## Tagline

Time, in motion.

## Status

Coming soon. Launching at avelorx.com.

## Contact

hello@avelorx.com
